required_preferences.fact: Checks in with his mother in person daily while she lives with him—no scheduled phone calls during her recovery

supersedes.fact: Schedules weekly phone check-ins with his mother—never relies on texting alone to stay in touch

required_preferences.fact: Reviews next day’s calendar immediately after dinner—no evening planning or pre-bed review allowed, per doctor's recommendation for a consistent, device-free sleep routine

supersedes.fact: Reviews next day’s calendar each evening before bed—never makes last-minute changes after lights out

required_preferences.fact: Avoids scheduling any non-essential external calls or meetings during the funder evaluation preparation period
Uses a wearable heart rate monitor continuously throughout the day to track cardiac health and medication effects—reviews trends each evening before bed
Uses an at-home blood pressure monitor every morning—logs readings in a dedicated health app
Prepares plant-based lunches at home daily—never eats fast food on workdays

persona: A mid-career nonprofit director managing grant agreements and partnerships
